nodes.name: Cameroonian Highlands forests
nodes.summary: Cameroonian Highlands forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Green-breasted bushshrike、Yellow-breasted boubou、Mountain sooty boubou等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 喀麥隆火山

nodes.name: 巴門達高原
nodes.summary: 巴門達高原是非洲中西部國家喀麥隆的高原，受赤道多雨氣候影響，每年平均降雨量1,000至2,000毫米，是薩納加河主要支流的發源地。

nodes.name: Mountain sooty boubou
nodes.summary: The mountain sooty boubou (Laniarius poensis), western boubou or mountain boubou, is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. Taxonomy It was formerly considered conspecific with the Albertine sooty boubou (Laniarius holomelas), with Willard's sooty boubou (Laniarius willardi), and with Fülleborn's sooty boubou (Laniarius fuelleborni). Two subspecies are currently recognized: nominate L. p. poensis, which is endemic to Bioko; and L. p. camerunensis which occurs on mainland Africa. Distribution and habitat It is found in the Cameroon line from Bioko, Equatorial Guinea north to Mount Oku, Cameroon and the Obudu Plateau, Nigeria. In the Cameroon highlands, it is found in montane forests, usually above 600 m in elevation. On Mount Cameroon, this species can occur at extremely low elevations on the windward slopes near the coast, with records from as low as c. 520 m above sea level. On both Bioko and Mt. Cameroon, this taxon is restricted to montane forests. References
